title: I encountered with the issue of connect board column when creating the solution package (monday app)

posts.author: kunlasap (Kunlasap Chaochaisit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to request assistance. I’ve already created the template as a solution pack by creating the app on my account, but I encountered the issue of the connect board column.

4 connected board columns that add new boards to the template automatically every time the template is used.

  • Roadmap: link to epics
  • Epics: link to sprint management
  • Sprint management: link to bugs queue, link to metadata

Does anyone else have this problem, or does anyone know how to solve it?

Regards,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kunlasap and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I do not understand the flow you are trying to achieve or the issue you are encountering.

Would you be able to send a screen recording explaining a little bit more so we can take a look?

Please do not include any sensitive data.

If you prefer it, you can also send this to appsupport@monday.com so our technical support team can take a look and you can share an email thread about it.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: kunlasap (Kunlasap Chaochaisit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Kunlasap Chaochaisit:

4 connected board columns that add new boards to the template automatically every time the template is used.

Hi Matias,
Thank you for responding. Would you mind watching my recording video to clarify the problem with the package? Please contact me if you require anything from me.

Regards,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @kunlasap,

If I understand correctly, what you want is to have some boards in a workspace template, and then if someone updates the boards, you want those changes to automatically go into previously created boards (created in the past), with that workspace template.

For example:

  1. You create the workspace template
  2. Someone creates some boards from your template
  3. You change something in a board from that template
  4. The change automatically changes the boards created in step 2

Is this accurate?
